vendor_context: Priority Bicycles competitor (eBike / commuter bike category)
status: ACTIVE — Healthy direct-to-consumer eBike brand; US, CA, DE storefronts

networks.name: AvantLink
networks.notes: Primary network. Provides full affiliate toolset: banner ads, datafeeds, text links. Program page at aventon.com/pages/affiliate-program managed via AvantLink.

networks.name: FlexOffers
networks.notes: FlexOffers listing confirmed in search results (Jan 2026 indexed). May be a syndicated AvantLink listing or separate program. FlexOffers page blocked on fetch (Cloudflare).

company_status.financial: STABLE — No bankruptcy or acquisition signals
company_status.positioning: Mid-range eBike brand focused on commuter and adventure segments; strong brand recognition, consistent inventory

competitive_intel.commission_vs_rad: Aventon 4% vs Rad Power Bikes ~6% — Rad historically offered higher rates but program continuity is now uncertain post-bankruptcy
competitive_intel.affiliate_risk: LOW — Stable brand, active AvantLink program, clear terms
competitive_intel.conversion_rate_vs_category: 2.5% CVR is solid for eBike category (research-heavy, high AOV purchases)
competitive_intel.opportunity_for_priority: Aventon's AvantLink program is well-established and attracts cycling content affiliates. Priority Bicycles competes for the same affiliate pool. Priority's differentiator should be simplicity (no battery/charging) and lower maintenance story.

history.event: Routine audit. No changes. aventon.com affiliate page confirmed: 4% commission / 30-day cookie / AvantLink / 2.5% CVR — all terms stable. FlexOffers listing still active (Jan 2026 indexed, Cloudflare-blocked on direct fetch). Brand activity: Spring Sale running through mid-April (Level 3 + Pace 4 from $1,599; Aventure M Mid-Drive at $2,699 new low). BikeMag reviewed Aventon Current eMTB (Apr 15) — 'Best Budget eMTB of 2026?' Positive press. No affiliate program changes detected — no Discord alert fired.

Routine audit. No changes. aventon.com affiliate page confirms 4% commission / 30-day cookie / AvantLink / 2.5% CVR — all stable. Third-party aggregator (magentheme) listed '5-10% / AvantLink+Refersion' but this is unconfirmed and contradicted by the authoritative source. FlexOffers secondary listing still active (last indexed Jan 2026). Company status: 3 storefronts (US/CA/DE) active.

First audit. No prior file. Confirmed AvantLink as primary network, 4% commission, 30-day cookie, 2.5% CVR. FlexOffers secondary listing also active. Company stable — US, CA, DE storefronts, Aventon App live.
